programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.sub-title: The Crew Builds a Reuse-It Station; The Crew Builds a Duck Bridge
programme.desc: When Speed Meister builds his own station for reusing trash, the pups have to clean up the mess all over Builder Cove; after a baby duckling follows them home, Rubble & Crew use their construction know-how to bring the duckling back to its home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.sub-title: Tooth on the Loose; Scaredy Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile worries he'll be caught between his old best friend Buzzy and his new best friend Daisy; Mr. Crocodile, Daisy, and their friends are scared to fetch Martin's gloves from his spooky shed.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Chicken Tulip; Pups Stop an Xtreme Shark
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger and his mother help Mayor Goodway look for a rare tulip, Humdinger gets them all in trouble; the pups must save Daring Danny X when a mechanical shark stunt goes awry.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Big Brother; Pups Save a Giant Baby
programme.desc: Farmer Yumi dreams about what her new baby will be like when she's bigger.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Potato Puff; There Will Be Grease!
programme.desc: Mrs. Puff's new substitute teacher gives SpongeBob a crash course in driving; Mr. Krabs and Plankton must work together after discovering a well of miracle-grease under their restaurants.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Wiener Takes All; Stuck in an Elevator
programme.desc: Squidward takes a new job as manager of Weenie Hut Jr's; Squidward gets trapped on his way to return a nearly overdue library book.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Captain Pipsqueak; Plane to Sea

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Pineapple Invasion; Salsa Imbecilicus
programme.desc: When SpongeBob hides the secret Krabby Patty formula in his home, Gary must protect it from Plankton; Sandy must save the day when a freak accident causes everyone in town to become as stupid as Patrick.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.sub-title: Two Pests in a Teapot; Partial Recall

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Single-Celled Defense; Buff for Puff
programme.desc: Plankton takes self-defense lessons from Sandy; Mr. Krabs hits the gym after a beach challenge from Larry.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Spot Returns; The Check-Up
programme.desc: When his pet amoeba Spot has puppies, Plankton decides to use them in another of his nefarious plots; Mr. Krabs is afraid to get his physical, but if he does not pass the Krusty Krab will be shut down.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Krusty Koncessionaires; Dream Hoppers
programme.desc: The Krusty Krab crew goes to a big concert to sell Krabby Patties in the stands; SpongeBob explores the melodious dreamscapes of his sleeping neighbors.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Goons on the Moon
programme.desc: Sandy leads the scouts through space for scientific exploration, where SpongeBob finds life exists in the form of a Krabby Patty, Sandy studies the moon's gravitational effect on nuts, and Squidward goes to the dark side.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Big Top Flop; Sandy, Help Us!
programme.desc: When the circus comes to town and steals his customers away, Mr. Krabs tries to sabotage the show; Sandy spends the day solving everyone's issues, only to return home to her own monster of a problem.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Unagi
programme.desc: Chandler's anniversary gift to Monica is really one an ex-girlfriend gave him; Joey hires a look-alike; Ross tries to teach martial arts to Rachel.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Dates a Student

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Joey's Fridge

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Mac and C.H.E.E.S.E

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One That Could Have Been
programme.desc: When Rachel tells her friends about Barry and Mindy's impending divorce, the others speculate how their lives could have turned out if they had chosen different paths.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One That Could Have Been

programme.title: Friends

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Proposal

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Proposal

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Monica's Thunder

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.sub-title: The Day We Almost Died
programme.desc: When a near-death experience leads to several members of the family deciding to make life changes, the rest of the clan bears the brunt of their new attitudes.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.sub-title: The Big Guns

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.sub-title: Rash Decisions

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Welcome to Jury Duty
programme.desc: Calvin and Dave are both chosen to serve as jurors on the same trial; Malcolm and Marty get a big surprise when they fail to ask what the movie is about after they rent out their house for a film shoot.

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Welcome to the Knockout
programme.desc: As Dave nears his 40th birthday, Calvin offers to coach his friend for an amateur boxing tournament; sparks fly when Marty meets a new woman at the gym.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Welcome to the Big One
programme.desc: The Butlers and Johnsons are rattled in different ways after an earthquake strikes; Dave goes to extremes trying to prepare his family for the next earthquake.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Spy Buddies; Boat Smarts; Good Ol' Whathisname
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs sends SpongeBob and Patrick to spy on Plankton; Squidward and SpongeBob make an instructional video on boating techniques; Mr. Krabs holds a contest.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a White Wolf; Pups Save a Wrong-Way Explorer
programme.desc: After a sudden snowstorm, Everest cares for a white wolf cub as they work together to help the PAW Patrol find them; famous wrong-way explorer Travelling Travis accidentally takes Chickaletta to the North Pole, where they run into some crocodiles.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Rescue a Rescuer; Pups Save the Phantom of Frog Pond
programme.desc: Mayor Goodway tries to help the PAW Patrol rescue Danny, but the pups end up having to rescue the rescuer, too; when a spooky sound forces frogs from their home, the pups must bring them home and solve the mystery of the frog pond phantom.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save the Hiding Elephants; Pups Save a Yodeler
programme.desc: Elephants become trapped in the Monkey Temple after a bee frightens them away from their watering hole; Wingnut runs away from wolves that are attracted to his yodeling and he ends up trapped in a canyon.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save the Baby Space Rocks; Pups Save the Eddies and Emmys
programme.desc: When a mysterious storm drops hailstones that hatch into Baby Space Rocks, the Pups must find a way to keep them safe; a 3D printer leads to trouble when Eddie and Emmy make 3D reproductions of themselves and play pranks.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.sub-title: Tiny Creatures; Daddy Pig's Office; Pirate Island; George Catches a Cold; The Balloon Ride
programme.desc: Peppa and George play in the garden; Peppa and George visit Daddy Pig's office; Granny and Grandpa Pig take everyone on a boat trip; Peppa and George jump in mud puddles; Peppa's family attends a celebration.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Charger Visits the Pups; Pups Save a Shiny Ride
programme.desc: Rubble's cousin Charger visits Adventure Bay just in time to help out when a Humdinger-caused geyser destroys Mr. Porter's café; Mayor Humdinger hatches a plan to sabotage the Shiniest Ride Contest, so it's up to the PAW Patrol to save the day.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Aqua Pups Save the Reef; Aqua Pups Stop a Giant Squid
programme.desc: The Aqua Pups rescue Coral, Moby and McSquidly from a submarine before it crashes into a delicate reef; the Aqua Pups must save the Merpups' golden orb release when Moby lures a Giant Squid into Puplantis.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups and the Stinky Bubble Trouble; Pups Save the Baby Ostriches
programme.desc: A strange odor chases jungle animals away from their homes; after Olivia the Ostrich falls into a canyon, the pups work together to lift her to safety and protect her soon-to-hatch eggs.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save Gustavo's Guitar; Pups Save the Yoga Goats
programme.desc: The pups need to find Gustavo Goodway's missing guitar before the evening's campfire concert; Farmer Yumi's new yoga goat class is a hit, until her goats go missing.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save the Hatchlings; Pups Save a Wrongway Farmhand
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger decides to make the world's biggest omelet, he accidentally orders the wrong kind of eggs: ones that hatch; traveling Travis volunteers to watch farmer Yumi and farmer Al's farm and characteristically messes up everything.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.sub-title: The Crew Builds a Big Bike Shop; The Crew Builds a Super Tub
programme.desc: Rubble and the pups work to build a big bike shop in time for the Bike Festival, unless Speed Meister beats them to it; when Motor won't take a bath before their family photo, it's up to Rubble and the pups to find a construction solution.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.sub-title: Pretend Friend / Croc Outta Water
programme.desc: Winston tries to be the leader on a nature hike, but his high-tech gadget gets everyone lost in the woods; when Daisy skins her knee learning to skateboard, Mr. Crocodile tries to keep her from ever getting another boo-boo.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups vs. a Neon Humdinger; Pups Save a Royal Painting
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger's giant neon sign of himself gets loose, the PAW Patrol must stop it from rolling through town.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Trophy; Pups Save the Wind Trekkers
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger's mom loses her son's phony trophy, the PAW Patrol have to rescue her and its secret stash of treats; when Mayor Goodway and Chickaletta get trapped inside a mesa, it's up to the PAW Patrol and a little snake to rescue them.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Call the Cops; Surf N' Turf
programme.desc: Plankton goes to jail, but the secret formula is taken as evidence, so SpongeBob and Mr. Krabs plot to get it back; Sandy struggles to build a ship-in-a-bottle before a big contest, so SpongeBob calls in a little extra help.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Delivery of Doom; My Father the Boat
programme.desc: SpongeBob is challenged by E.V.I.L. to make a delivery to their secret lair in 10 minutes or less; when Mr. Krabs gets trapped inside Pearl's new boat, he must pretend to be its engine to avoid being caught.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: The Dirty Bubble Bass; Sheldon SquarePants
programme.desc: Bubble Bass and the dirty bubble team up to become Bikini Bottom's nastiest nefarious nuisance; Plankton joins the SquarePants family in the hope of becoming closer to SpongeBob and the secret formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Plankton's Intern; Patrick's Tantrum
programme.desc: Plankton needs help stealing the formula, so he hires an intern who knows more about Mr. Krabs than anyone; Patrick goes into a destructive fit whenever he hears a bell, so his friends help him in their own ways.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.sub-title: All Out of Idea Bricks; A Fool Schooled

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Sammy Suckerfish; Big League Bob

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Feral Friends; Don't Wake Patrick!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Plankton Retires; Trident Trouble

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Knock Knock, Who's There?; Pat Hearts Squid
programme.desc: SpongeBob watches Mr. Krabs' house while he's away and takes extreme measures to make sure no one breaks in; Squidward is forced to room with Patrick.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Despicable Me
programme.desc: Supervillain Gru, a man who delights in all things wicked, hatches a plan to steal the moon. Surrounded by an army of little yellow minions and his impenetrable arsenal of weapons and war machines, Gru prepares to vanquish all who stand in his way. However, nothing in his calculations and groundwork has prepared him for his greatest challenge: three adorable orphan girls who want to make him their dad.

programme.sub-title: The One With Rachel's Assistant

programme.sub-title: The One With the Engagement Picture

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With the Nap Partners

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With Ross' Library Book
programme.desc: Ross' doctoral dissertation is stored in a remote corner of the university library frequently used by students having sex; Rachel and Phoebe bond with Joey's date (Kristin Davis), then try to convince him to continue seeing her.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Doesn't Like Dogs
programme.desc: Tag joins for Thanksgiving dinner; Joey may have ruined Rachel's chances with Tag when he opens his mouth during dinner; Phoebe reveals that she has been secretly keeping a dog in her room for a few days while its owner is away.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One With All the Candy
programme.desc: Rachel finds it embarrassing that she is paying the way for her hunky new boyfriend (Eddie Cahill), who is also her assistant at work.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.sub-title: Valentine's Day 4: Twisted Sister
programme.desc: Claire senses Phil may be more into "Juliana" than her; Gloria's sister visits; Mitchell and Cameron get into a situation with Anders.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.sub-title: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: Claire takes a first class seat on a flight, leaving Phil in coach; Gloria makes Jay teach Manny how to defend himself; Mitch, Cam and their friends throw Sal a belated baby shower.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.sub-title: Connection Lost
programme.desc: While stuck at the airport, Claire partakes in online snooping that creates drama with the rest of the family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Welcome to the Stakeout
programme.desc: When there's a break-in at Calvin's business, he teams up with Dave for a stakeout to catch the culprit in the act; Gemma is uncharacteristically reluctant to share her new hobby with Tina.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Welcome to the Man Code
programme.desc: When Calvin discovers his friend Lorenzo is harboring a secret, he struggles with whether to share the information with Tina; Dave becomes concerned about Gemma's growing closeness to a coach at her school.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: Welcome to the Big Little Leagues
programme.desc: Calvin and Malcolm butt heads on coaching styles as Malcolm's little league team approaches its first game of the season; Tina tries to win over a food critic she inadvertently offended before he reviews her cupcakes.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.sub-title: Ghost Host; Chimps Ahoy
programme.desc: The Flying Dutchman takes up residence at SpongeBob's house; the beneficiaries of Sandy's treedome pay her a visit.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save Hummy Mummy's New Home; Pups Save Adventure Bakes
programme.desc: A pair of alligators take Mayor Humdinger's mother, Helga Humdinger, on a wild ride across Foggy Bottom!; Winnie Winnington is determined to beat Mayor Goodway and Chickaletta in a cooking competition to find Adventure Bay's best bakers.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save Bedtime; Pups Save Chickaletta's Egg
programme.desc: The Turbots are trapped somewhere in the jungle, but their phone cuts out when they try to call the Paw Patrol; after Chickaletta lays an egg, it rolls away and heads through town.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Manatee; Pups Save Breakfast
programme.desc: Farmer Al and Farmer Yumi need help from the PAW Patrol to get a manatee to the swamp; Mr. Porter and Alex get into a sticky situation involving maple syrup.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Jungle Pups: Pups Save the Big, Big Animals
programme.desc: When the Hidden Jungle animals appear to be uncharacteristically frightened, Marshall discovers a saber-tooth tiger has been stalking them; the big-fanged tiger is not the only creature strangely awakening from long, long ago.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save the Elephant Spa; Pups Save an Underwater Otis
programme.desc: While trying to save Traveling Travis, Ryder and the pups stumble across the legendary Elephants Spa; Uncle Otis believes he's found gold but when Sid the Pirate tries to jump on Otis' claim, Otis gets trapped in a sunken shipping container.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups vs. the Hum-flectors; Pups Save a Capybara
programme.desc: After a drone carrying Humdinger's reflecting panel crashes in a tree, the reflector concentrates a beam of light on a wooden bridge, causing it to burn; the PAW Patrol rescues Winnie and a capybara when they go rolling off in a giant exercise ball.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Aqua Pups Save a Floating Castle; Aqua Pups Save the Reef; Aqua Pups Stop a Giant Squid; Aqua Pups Save a Mer-Race; Aqua Pups Save a Merdinger
programme.desc: Moby wants to clear all the Merpups out of Puplantis and make the castle his own; the PAW Patrol is there to stop his soggy schemes with help from a new Cockapoo Merpup named Coral.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
